title: alsophila humilis var. humilis
intro: Alsophila humilis var. humilis, also known as the Black Tree Fern, is a species of tree fern native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Alsophila humilis var. humilis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional.
